why: Ensure all entries meet required field constraints before building index
output: Validation result with valid entries and array of validation errors per invalid entry

success_handling.criteria: Schema validation completes for all entries

error_handling.scenario: Schema validation fails for some entries
error_handling.criteria: One or more entries have missing required fields or invalid field types
error_handling.action: Exclude invalid entries from index, include them in report

decisions.outcome: Proceed to build-index step with full set
Proceed to build-index step with valid subset, report invalid entries
